request_payload.exposure_text: 🚨 Did you hear about the recent security lapses in our cities? While we debate civil liberties, foreign actors are exploiting our openness. Stronger domestic security powers aren't about restricting freedoms - they're about protecting our way of life. Our allies are already taking preemptive measures. Shouldn't we prioritize preparedness over ideological purity? #NationalSecurityFirst
